chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Application No.S-364 of 2019 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on MA No.2716/2019 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on MA No.2727/2019 4. For hearing of main case 27-05-2019 Mr. Achar Khan Gabole, Advocate for applicant.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Allowed. 2 to 4. Leaned counsel for the applicant states that the applicant has already availed remedy available to him under section 249-A Cr.P.C by moving an application before the trial Court in the month of September 2017 and since the same was not decided by the learned trial Court, the same was withdrawn by the applicant on 12.01.2019. Learned counsel however states that he is ready to re-approach the trial Court concerned along with application 249-A Cr.P.C r/w section 265-K Cr.P.C for premature acquittal of the applicant but applicant apprehends that his application shall not be decided by the Trial Court and if the trial Court is directed to decided his application preferably within a month he would not press this application. Accordingly instant application is dismissed as not pressed. However, if such application for premature acquittal under relevant provision is filed by the applicant, the trial Court shall decide the same within 30 days of the filing of said application. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
